reviews.comment:
A pesar de haber mucha concurrencia en el lugar, los baños deberían estar limpios lamentablemente los baños daban asco. He pasado por allí en varias oportunidades y la verdad siembre estuvieron bien pero esta vez wstaban sucios. Espero mejoren.

(Translated by Google)
Despite the high volume of people there, the restrooms should be clean, but unfortunately, they were disgusting. I've been there several times, and they've always been fine, but this time they were filthy. I hope they improve.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXcXRYSkpnEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The only working bathroom, terribly dirty, and the toilet button broken, the next day, the same situation
